source: median-of-medians across 5 most-recent comprehensive_results.json on vasp-03 NFS (commits 5aa5611, a5b892a, 24e1e83, a8260cd, a374e3b — all dev-tip benchmark dispatches between 2026-05-07T17:36 and 18:48 UTC)
notes: Initial bootstrap baseline for the Aitchison-d_A delta gate (Milestone A, 2026-05-08). All 6 comprehensive-runner pipelines currently produce identical median d_A = 4.0003 — a fixed point from deterministic synthetic compositions. Subsequent PRs will be measured against this baseline; any PR that perturbs a pipeline's median (in either direction) will surface as 'improved' or 'regressed' in the gate output. Initial run is in advisory mode (cfg.advisory_mode=true) — d_A regressions warn but do not block until the empirical noise distribution stabilises (target: ≥16 PRs across ≥2 datasets, MAD < 0.5× median). Promotion is currently MANUAL — automate via scripts/promote-baseline.py (deferred from Milestone A scope).
